heroDescription: At The Smart Calculator, your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our website https://www.thesmartcalculator.com/ and our free online calculators.
heroDisclaimer: By accessing or using our website, you agree to the practices described in this policy.

overviewItems.title: SSL Encryption
overviewItems.description: We use SSL encryption to protect data transmitted via our website

overviewItems.title: No Data Selling
overviewItems.description: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information with third parties

overviewItems.title: Restricted Access
overviewItems.description: Access to personal data is restricted to authorized team members only

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.description: When you use our website, we may collect the following types of information:

subsections.title: Personal Information (Optional):
items: Name, email address, or contact details (only if you choose to contact us via our form or email).

subsections.title: Non-Personal Information (Automatically Collected):
items: Device type, browser type, IP address, operating system.
Pages visited, time spent, and general usage data for analytics.

subsections.title: Cookies & Tracking:
items: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience and to analyze website performance.
You can disable cookies in your browser settings at any time.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
items: Improve our calculators and website functionality.
Provide better customer support and respond to your inquiries.
Analyze usage patterns and optimize user experience.
Ensure website security and prevent misuse.
Share updates, newsletters, or promotional content (only if you subscribe).

sections.title: Data Protection & Security
sections.description: We take your privacy seriously and implement appropriate measures to safeguard your data.
items: SSL encryption is used to protect data transmitted via our website.
We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information with third parties.
Access to personal data is restricted to authorized team members only.

sections.title: Sharing of Information
items: We may share non-personal, aggregated data with trusted third-party service providers (e.g., analytics tools like Google Analytics) to improve website performance.
We do not sell or disclose personal data to advertisers or unauthorized parties.

sections.title: Third-Party Links
sections.description: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for their privacy practices. Please review their privacy policies before providing personal information.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.description: Depending on your location, you may have the right to:
items: Access the personal data we hold about you.
Request corrections or deletion of your information.
Opt out of cookies or marketing communications.
sections.footer: To exercise these rights, please contact us at: thesmartcalculators@gmail.com

sections.title: Children's Privacy
sections.description: Our website and calculators are not intended for children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.

sections.title: Updates to This Policy
sections.description: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in technology, law, or our services. The updated policy will always be posted on this page with the revised date.

sections.title: Contact Us
sections.description: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how your information is handled, please contact us:
